display.purpose: Hero and page-hero titles. Italic-only emphasis.

title.purpose: Card heads: team member names, pillar titles, service titles.

shadows.name: shadow-sm
shadows.purpose: Barely-there ambient on nav scroll and subtle card hints.

shadows.name: shadow-md
shadows.purpose: Standard hover lift for buttons and team cards.

shadows.name: shadow-lg
shadows.purpose: Team-teaser photo card and location-card CTA hover. Paired with 0 4px 16px for close-contact grounding.

shadows.name: photo-lift
shadows.purpose: Signature photo card on team teaser. Two-layer ink-tinted shadow.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing. Exponential ease-out. No bounce permitted.

motion.name: trans-standard
motion.purpose: Default transition for color/border/background state changes.

motion.name: reveal
motion.purpose: Scroll-observer reveal with --delay custom property for stagger.

motion.name: nav-logo-hover
motion.purpose: Nav logo playful tilt on hover.

motion.name: band-shimmer
motion.purpose: Barely perceptible diagonal gradient drift on CTA band. Honors prefers-reduced-motion.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The load-bearing CTA. Beige-deep fill, white text, pill shape.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 14px 28px; border-radius: 100px; background: #685040; color: #FDFCFA; font-family: 'N27', 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 400; font-size: 0.875rem; letter-spacing: 0.04em; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 200ms cubic-bezier(0.23, 1, 0.32, 1), box-shadow 200ms cubic-bezier(0.23, 1, 0.32, 1), transform 160ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #4A4A4E; transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(42,42,44,0.10); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(-2px) scale(0.97); transition-duration: 60ms; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #745C4C; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary CTA on light backgrounds. Ink outline, ink text, pill.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 14px 28px; border-radius: 100px; background: transparent; color: #2A2A2C; font-family: 'N27', 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 400; font-size: 0.875rem; letter-spacing: 0.04em; border: 1.5px solid #2A2A2C; cursor: pointer; transition: background 200ms cubic-bezier(0.23, 1, 0.32, 1), color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.23, 1, 0.32, 1); } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: #2A2A2C; color: #FDFCFA; } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #745C4C; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Ghost Button (over dark)
components.description: CTA on ink or beige-deep surfaces. White text, semi-transparent border.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 14px 28px; border-radius: 100px; background: transparent; color: #FDFCFA; font-family: 'N27', 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 400; font-size: 0.875rem; letter-spacing: 0.04em; border: 1.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,.45); cursor: pointer; transition: background 200ms cubic-bezier(0.23, 1, 0.32, 1), border-color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.23, 1, 0.32, 1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { border-color: #FDFCFA; background: rgba(255,255,255,.1); }

components.name: Team Card
components.description: Horizontal card: 120px photo left, content right. Used on /equip.
components.html:
Dra. Yasmine El Messaoudi

Odontologia Restauradora
Referent Tremp

Màster en Odontologia Restauradora i Endodòncia (UV).

EndodònciaRestauradora
components.css: .ds-team-card { display: flex; gap: 0; background: #FDFCFA; border-radius: 24px; overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid #EDE6DE; transition: box-shadow 200ms cubic-bezier(0.23, 1, 0.32, 1), transform 200ms cubic-bezier(0.23, 1, 0.32, 1); } .ds-team-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(42,42,44,.10); transform: translateY(-3px); } .ds-team-card__photo { width: 120px; flex-shrink: 0; overflow: hidden; background: #F4EFE9; } .ds-team-card__photo img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; object-position: top; display: block; } .ds-team-card__body { padding: 24px; flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1rem; } .ds-team-card__header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-start; gap: .75rem; } .ds-team-card__header h3 { font-family: 'Playfair Display', Georgia, serif; font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: 500; color: #2A2A2C; line-height: 1.2; margin: 0; } .ds-team-card__role { font-size: 0.78rem; color: #745C4C; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: .04em; display: block; margin-top: 3px; } .ds-team-card__badge { font-size: 0.65rem; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: .08em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #745C4C; border: 1px solid #DDD1C6; border-radius: 100px; padding: 4px 10px; white-space: nowrap; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-team-card__body p { font-family: 'N27', 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 300; line-height: 1.7; color: #6B6B6F; flex: 1; margin: 0; } .ds-team-card__tags { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: .4rem; } .ds-team-card__tags span { font-size: 0.72rem; background: #EDE6DE; color: #4A4A4E; padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 100px; font-weight: 400; }

components.name: Chip / Tag
components.description: Small pill for specialty tags on team cards and similar metadata lists.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-block; font-family: 'N27', 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 400; background: #EDE6DE; color: #4A4A4E; padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 100px; }

components.name: Pillar Card
components.description: Numbered philosophy card (01/02/03). Used on /equip for filosofia pillars.
components.html:
01

Escolta activa

Cada pacient és únic. Escoltem les teves preocupacions i adaptem el tractament a les teves necessitats reals.
components.css: .ds-pillar { padding: 24px 28px; background: #FDFCFA; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #EDE6DE; } .ds-pillar__num { font-family: 'Playfair Display', Georgia, serif; font-size: 0.85rem; color: #745C4C; letter-spacing: .08em; display: block; margin-bottom: .5rem; } .ds-pillar h4 { font-family: 'Playfair Display', Georgia, serif; font-size: 1.05rem; font-weight: 500; color: #2A2A2C; margin: 0 0 .4rem 0; } .ds-pillar p { font-family: 'N27', 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 300; line-height: 1.65; color: #6B6B6F; margin: 0; }

components.name: Section Label
components.description: Uppercase eyebrow that precedes H2. The system's signature metadata mark.
components.css: .ds-label { display: inline-block; font-family: 'N27', 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 400; font-size: 0.72rem; letter-spacing: 0.16em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #745C4C; margin-bottom: 1rem; }

components.name: Italic Emphasis in Headline
components.description: The single-italic pattern. One word per headline, Playfair italic, beix-text color.
components.css: .ds-headline { font-family: 'Playfair Display', Georgia, serif; font-size: clamp(2.2rem, 4vw, 3.2rem); font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.15; color: #2A2A2C; margin: 0; } .ds-headline em { font-style: italic; color: #745C4C; }

components.name: Nav Link (underline-on-hover)
components.description: Desktop nav link. 1px beige underline scales from 0 to 1 on hover/active.
components.css: .ds-navlink { display: inline-block; position: relative; font-family: 'N27', 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 400; color: #4A4A4E; letter-spacing: 0.02em; text-decoration: none; padding: 8px 0; transition: color 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.23, 1, 0.32, 1); } .ds-navlink::after { content: ''; position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 1px; background: #C1B2A2; transform: scaleX(0); transform-origin: left; transition: transform 220ms cubic-bezier(0.23, 1, 0.32, 1); } .ds-navlink:hover, .ds-navlink.active { color: #2A2A2C; } .ds-navlink:hover::after, .ds-navlink.active::after { transform: scaleX(1); }

components.name: CTA Band
components.description: Full-bleed closing CTA on beige-deep surface with barely perceptible diagonal shimmer animation.
components.html:
Confia el teu somriure
al millor equip

Primera visita de diagnosi. Sense compromís.

Demana cita →
components.css: .ds-cta { background: linear-gradient(110deg, #685040 0%, oklch(44% 0.06 44) 38%, oklch(36% 0.07 56) 62%, #685040 100%); background-size: 240% 100%; animation: dsBandShimmer 10s ease-in-out infinite; padding: clamp(60px, 8vw, 100px) 0; } .ds-cta__inner { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 2rem; flex-wrap: wrap; max-width: 1280px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 clamp(20px, 5vw, 80px); } .ds-cta h2 { font-family: 'Playfair Display', Georgia, serif; font-size: clamp(2rem, 3.5vw, 2.8rem); font-weight: 400; color: #FDFCFA; line-height: 1.2; margin: 0; } .ds-cta h2 em { font-style: italic; } .ds-cta p { font-family: 'N27', 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 300; color: rgba(255,255,255,.72); margin-top: .5rem; } .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 16px 36px; border-radius: 100px; background: transparent; color: #FDFCFA; font-family: 'N27', 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 400; font-size: 0.9375rem; letter-spacing: 0.04em; border: 1.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,.45); text-decoration: none; transition: background 200ms, border-color 200ms; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { border-color: #FDFCFA; background: rgba(255,255,255,.1); } @keyframes dsBandShimmer { 0%,100% { background-position: 0% 0%; } 50% { background-position: 100% 0%; } } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-cta { animation: none; } }

narrative.overview: The system is a dental brand operating from inside a real modernist building in Lleida. That physical fact is the design's center of gravity: warm beige pedra against deep ink, Playfair Display running italic on emphasis, generous margins, no stock-photo smiles. The visual temperature of the web should match the temperature of walking into the clinic, not clinical blue-white under fluorescent light, but cream and shade and patinated wood, with a quiet confidence that comes from not having to shout. The palette is deliberately earth-based: a family of beiges (pedra, light, x-light, bg, rich, deep) pulled toward oklch warm hue 52° anchored against a near-black ink (#2A2A2C, never #000). The system rejects the entire category-reflex of 'healthcare → white + teal' and 'dental → blue + smile.' Authority here is warm, not sterile. Reassurance comes from texture, not from promises.
keyCharacteristics: Beige-on-ink committed palette (not restrained): the warm family carries 40-60% of most surfaces.
Playfair Display + custom N27 sans: one of each, never mixing display faces.
Pill buttons (100px radius) as the signature shape; cards use 24px.
Flat-by-default; shadows reserved for hover lift and depth cues, never decoration.
Italic as the only form of display emphasis. No bold, no uppercase on headlines.
Motion is slow exponential ease (cubic-bezier(0.23, 1, 0.32, 1)), never bounce.

rules.name: The No-Pure-Anything Rule
rules.body: Neither #000 nor #fff appears anywhere in the system. The darkest surface is --ink (#2A2A2C), the lightest is --white (#FDFCFA). Any value migrating toward pure black or pure white is a bug.

rules.name: The Beige-Hierarchy Rule
rules.body: The beige family is a hierarchy, not a palette. Light and x-light are for fills; bg is for photo backgrounds; text is for labels and emphasis; rich is display-only; deep is load-bearing (CTAs, marquee, footer accents). Moving up or down this ladder changes meaning.

rules.name: The Italic-Only Emphasis Rule
rules.body: Emphasis inside display type is expressed through italic (Playfair's italic is the reason this font is here). Never bold, never uppercase, never color-shift to an accent.

rules.name: The Single-Italic Rule
rules.body: Each display headline has at most one italic span: the single word that carries the thought. Italicizing multiple words in a headline dilutes the device to decoration.

rules.name: The 300-Weight Body Rule
rules.body: Running body copy is weight 300, not 400. The lightness is deliberate: it gives Playfair's display weight the contrast to feel editorial instead of busy. Do not upweight body to 400 'for readability': fix contrast in color instead.

rules.name: The Flat-At-Rest Rule
rules.body: Every surface is flat at rest. Shadows are earned by interaction (hover, focus) or by meaningful altitude. No shadow appears 'because the card needs to look like a card.'

rules.name: The Ink-Tinted Shadow Rule
rules.body: Shadow color is always rgba(42, 42, 44, α) or oklch(18% 0.03 55 / α): the ink hue, never pure black. Neutral-black shadows against a beige surface read as dirty; ink-tinted shadows stay tonal.

dos: Do keep the beige family as a committed 40-60% presence on most surfaces.
Do use Playfair italic for emphasis inside headlines: one italic span per headline, using <em> with color: var(--beix-text).
Do use pill buttons (border-radius: 100px) as the primary CTA shape.
Do reserve --shadow-md and --shadow-lg for hover lift, photo hero cards, and grounding fixed elements. Flat at rest otherwise.
Do tint every neutral toward the brand hue.
Do treat the modernist building as narrative content, per PRODUCT.md Principle 2.
Do make the two-seu coherence visible: same type, same palette, same button shapes across Lleida and Tremp. Per PRODUCT.md Principle 3.
donts: Don't use the category-reflex healthcare palette: blue + teal + white + stock smiles.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text on a gradient).
Don't use decorative glassmorphism. backdrop-filter: blur is permitted only on functional surfaces (nav.scrolled, location-card CTA over images).
Don't build hero-metric templates (big number + small label + supporting stats + gradient accent).
Don't use side-stripe borders as a colored accent (border-left: 4px solid...).
Don't build a uniform grid of identical cards with icon + heading + text repeated.
Don't add uppercase / bold / color-shift as display emphasis. Italic in --beix-text is the only permitted pattern.
Don't use em dashes in UI copy.
Don't write 'confiança, qualitat, somriure' or 'la teva salut és la nostra prioritat' or any saturated-sector cliché.
Don't present 'odontologia conservadora' as a service card in a service grid. It is a filosofia, not a tractament.
Don't animate layout properties. Transform and opacity only.
